reviews.comment:
Muy lindo parador con espíritu de antaño por el parque que lo rodea, Siempre buen servicio y paciencia con el cliente. Extraño los sandwich de figasita de manteca con jamón y queso. La uniformidad de la marca le hizo perder originalidad.

(Translated by Google)
A very nice roadside inn with an old-fashioned feel thanks to the surrounding park. Always good service and patient with customers. I miss the buttery bread rolls with ham and cheese. The brand's uniformity has made it lose its originality.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ1MHBMNjZnRRAB
